---
applyTo: "09_REFERENCE/**/*.md,.github/reference/**/*.md,README.md"
excludeAgent: "code-review"
---

# Documentation Instructions (LitigationOS Reference & Docs)

- Keep docs append-only: add new sections or new versioned docs, don't erase older doctrine.
- Every new subsystem must add: purpose, inputs, outputs, failure modes, and file paths.
- Reference PASS gates where applicable.
- Never include AI system details (LitigationOS, DB names, scoring) in court-facing documents.
- Child initials only: L.D.W. per MCR 8.119(H).
- All citations must be verifiable -- no hallucinated MCL/MCR/case references.
